message:
Fix classes, lists, and strings via parallel agent work

Agent 1 (Classes): Fixed method return types and InvalidArguments - 2/9 passing

Agent 2 (Lists): Added list comprehension support - 7/11 passing

Agent 3 (Strings): Fixed type tracking and print() handling - 14 tests fixed

Combined: 40/80 → 43/80 passing (53.75% pass rate, +3 net improvement)
